pages.text: $(bold)Crimson Seed$()$(br2)Nether fungus grown into a tree. From the dynamic crimson.
pages.title: Crimson Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant this seed to raise its dynamic tree.$(br2)$(bold)Convert:$() this seed + $(italic)Netherrack$() → $(italic)Crimson Fungus$() (shapeless, one-way).
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
